---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected on the website or in the schema
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
---

## What is wrong?

A clear description of what is broken.

## Where did you see it?

- URL (if website): https://archstandard.org/...
- File or section (if content): e.g., `src/content/docs/standard/3-5-security-view.mdx` or "Section 3.5 Security View"
- Browser / OS (if a rendering issue): e.g., "Edge on Windows 11"

## What did you expect?

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## What happened instead?

A clear description of what actually happened.

## Additional context

Screenshots, error messages, console output, or anything else that helps diagnose.
